title: UK's Andy Burnham becomes PM as Trump slams Britain as 'Poverty Stricken Disaster'
summary_full: The prospect of Burnham, considered more left-leaning than Starmer, replacing the incumbent prime minister sent jitters through bond markets earlier this year.
summary_public: The prospect of Burnham, considered more left-leaning than Starmer, replacing the incumbent prime minister sent jitters through bond markets earlier this year.
